hero.subtitle: The algorithm of algorithms.
hero.subtitle2: See what's coming before it arrives.

story.title: The Story
story.p1: ALGO was born from a simple observation — the internet moves faster than any human can follow.
story.p2: Every day, thousands of pieces of content explode across TikTok, YouTube, Twitter, Instagram and Reddit. Most people discover them too late.
story.p3: ALGO exists to change that. To give everyone — creators, journalists, agencies, curious minds — the power to see what is coming before it arrives.

whatIs.title: What is ALGO

notSocial.title: Not a Social Network
notSocial.desc: No followers. No likes. No endless scrolling.

notNews.title: Not a News Aggregator
notNews.desc: No recycled headlines. No outdated information.

whatIs.description: An intelligent signal detector that scans the web in real time and surfaces <violet>what is about to explode</violet>, <pink>what is already exploding</pink>, and <orange>why</orange>.

power.title: Information is Power
power.desc: Those who see trends first have an unfair advantage. ALGO democratizes that power.

timing.title: Timing is Everything
timing.desc: The creator who posts 3 hours before a trend peaks gets 10x the reach. ALGO gives you that timing.

everyone.title: For Everyone
everyone.desc: Whether you're a solo creator or a global agency, ALGO gives you the same advantage.

creators.benefit: Know what to create before everyone else does. Ride waves at their peak.

cm.benefit: Never miss a trend that matters to your audience. Stay relevant, always.

journalists.benefit: Detect breaking stories before they break. Be first, not fast.

agencies.benefit: Bring your clients data-driven creative strategy backed by real signals.

curious.benefit: Understand why the internet works the way it does. See the patterns.

all.benefit: Stop chasing trends. Start predicting them.

signal.title: Signal Over Noise
signal.desc: In a world drowning in content, we surface only what matters. Every data point is a signal, not noise.

speed.title: Speed is Truth
speed.desc: On the internet, being second is being last. We prioritize real-time intelligence above all.

intelligence.title: Intelligence, Not Just Data
intelligence.desc: Raw numbers mean nothing. We transform data into actionable insights that drive decisions.

access.title: Democratized Access
access.desc: Trend intelligence shouldn't be reserved for those with million-dollar budgets. It's for everyone.

human.title: Human-Centric Design
human.desc: Technology serves humans, not the other way around. Every feature exists to empower you.

evolving.title: Always Evolving
evolving.desc: The internet never stops. Neither do we. ALGO improves every single day.

idea.title: The Idea
idea.desc: ALGO is born from observing how trends spread faster than anyone can follow.

prototype.title: First Prototype
prototype.desc: Building the viral scoring algorithm that would become ALGO's brain.

engine.title: Real-Time Engine
engine.desc: Developing the signal detection system across multiple platforms.

beta.title: Beta Launch
beta.desc: Opening ALGO to the first wave of creators and trend hunters.

launch.title: Public Launch
launch.desc: ALGO goes live. The viral radar is now in everyone's hands.

ai.title: AI Predictions
ai.desc: Launching predictive algorithms that forecast trends before they peak.

global.title: Global Expansion
global.desc: ALGO now tracks trends in 50+ countries and 20+ languages.

future.title: The Future
future.desc: Building the next generation of trend intelligence.

vision.title: The Vision
vision.p1: A world where <violet>anyone can read the pulse of the internet</violet>.
vision.p2: Where the signal is always louder than the noise.
vision.p3: Where ALGO is the first thing you open in the morning and the last thing you check at night.

cta.title: Ready to see the future?
cta.subtitle: Start exploring what's trending right now.
